title: Neutradol Sniff n Purr Pet Deodoriser, Odour Neutraliser for Pet Areas, Carpet & Room Deodoriser For Pet Odours, Pure Fresh, Multipack (Pack of 3)
features: Targets Stubborn Pet Odours: Effectively neutralises deep set smells caused by pets. Ideal for homes with dogs, cats, or small animals, where pet odours tend to linger in fabrics and floors.

Science Powered Formula: Backed by over 30 years of innovation, Neutradol's unique formula goes beyond surface freshness, breaking down odour molecules at the source for long-lasting, truly clean results.
Safe for Pets & Family: Specially formulated pet-friendly powder, Sniff n Purr is gentle enough for use in shared spaces, yet tough enough to tackle everyday odours in busy, pet loving homes.
Multi-Surface Use: Perfect for pet beds, carpets, area rugs and upholstery. Refreshes any area where your pets love to lounge, sleep, or play.
Fresh, Clean Finish: Leaves a subtle, clean scent without any overpowering perfume or chemical smell. No residue, no staining, just a fresher space for pets and people alike.
